summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 6 testing of Railway Asset Inspection Management System. Backend router refactor successful with 34/35 API tests passing (97.1%). All new notification features working: paginated API, filters (search/type/date), bulk actions (mark all read, delete read). Frontend fully functional with complete Notifications page, bell icon dropdown, sidebar nav item with unread badge, and deep-link inspection history support. All existing flows verified working with no regressions.

notes: Dashboard Oversight Category Assets endpoint requires asset_type_id query parameter (422 error) - this is expected behavior, not a bug

passed_tests: Backend: Notifications - Backwards compatible (flat list) - 15 notifications
Backend: Notifications - Paginated response with items, total, page, page_size, total_pages
Backend: Notifications - Date range filter working
Backend: Dashboard stats (70 assets, 5 orange, 7 red)
Frontend: Sidebar Notifications nav item present
Frontend: Bell icon dropdown with 'View all notifications' button
Frontend: Notifications page loaded with all UI elements
Frontend: Notifications page filters - Search input
Frontend: Notifications page filters - Date range (From/To)
Frontend: Notifications page bulk actions - Mark all read button
Frontend: Notifications page bulk actions - Delete read button
Frontend: Notifications page empty state displayed correctly
